text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've finished work for the day and am thinking of
taking a stroll, when...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, heeey! ♪ You wouldn't happen to be about
to go on a walk, would you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. If sooo... I'd just looove it if you'd join me
for a bit! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Flash!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
#CurrenAfterSchool #CuteCafe #Pink
#StrawberryMilk #Probably

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Flash!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
#CuteCurrenChan #SelfieBreak #Date #With
#Friend

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer. Do you think I'm... cute today?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yay! ♪ Ehehe, I'm so happy. Keep the photos
coming! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
#HeadingHome #Sunset #CurrenInSepia... And
that's a wrap!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thanks for hanging out with me today! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! We got sooo many cute pics! And having
someone take the pics for you is just as fun as I
th—

text_block_list.name: College Girl
text_block_list.text:
I finally found you! Yes, you there! The
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Me?

text_block_list.name: College Girl
text_block_list.text:
You're Curren Chan, right?! Oooh, you're even
cuter in person than on Umastagram!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, so you follow me?! Thanks so much! ☆
Since we're here, do you wanna take a selfie?

text_block_list.name: College Girl
text_block_list.text:
R-really?! Could I—I mean, of course not! I didn't
come here to get all chummy with you!

text_block_list.name: College Girl
text_block_list.text:
Listen up. I'm here to challenge you. I might not
be anywhere near as popular as you right now,
but I swear I'll get more likes than you one day!

text_block_list.name: College Girl
text_block_list.text:
Just you wait. I'll beat you using the one thing I
have that you don't—womanly charm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having said her piece, the girl leaves briskly,
stealing occasional glances at Curren Chan as she
goes.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...She left.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... Womanly charm, huh?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer... Am I lacking in womanly charm?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Really? So what about me is womanly?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Can you look at me, please? I want you to answer
without averting your eyes. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's no lie that Curren Chan is dripping with
charm, but as for being womanly, I find myself
hard-pressed to find a response...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know. You can't decide, right? Like I'm sooo
charming you can't settle on an answer? Hehe, in
that case...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I want you to help me discover my most defining
womanly charm! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I feel comfortable asking since it's you... So,
pretty please?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! ♪ Thank you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to turn Curren Chan down, I find myself
recruited to the search for her womanly charm...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Sooomehooow, I get the feeling you're
just paying me lip service. Did you really mean
what you said?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
See, I knew it! Geez! In that case, I'll just have to
discover my womanly charm on my own and show
you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And when I do and your heart skips a beat... you'd
better have some kind of present for me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having said that, Curren Chan leans in to look at
me close with a mischievous smile.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Is that so? But you know what? I'm not
giving up!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You might not get it right now, but boy will you
be surprised when you see how grown up I
become! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And when that time comes, you have to tell me if
I made your heart flutter, okay?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having said that, Curren Chan gives me an impish
wink.
